gaps.title: Add TraitTelescopeOptics for physical telescope magnification + FOV (A-009 example-driven request)
gaps.description: While composing alpine-observatory-midnight stress-test, the @eyepiece_view render_portal required manually specifying fov_deg: 0.67 and magnification: 200 as disconnected magic numbers. A @telescope_optics trait would derive these from physical parameters: objective_diameter_mm, focal_length_mm, eyepiece_focal_length_mm, barlow_factor. It should also expose exit_pupil_mm (human eye limit: 7mm dark-adapted), limiting_magnitude (Dawes limit + aperture), and diffraction_ring_visibility. This enables physically accurate rendering of any telescope combination and catches unrealistic configs at validation time. Suggested API shape: @telescope_optics(objective_diameter_mm: 600, focal_length_mm: 2400, eyepiece_focal_length_mm: 12, barlow_factor: 1.0) → derives fov_deg=0.25, magnification=200, exit_pupil_mm=3.0. Pairs naturally with @starfield and @aurora for observatory scenes.
